<!-- PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md -->
## Summary
Please provide a short description of the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist
- [ ] CI (html-proofer) passes
- [ ] I have run `bundle exec rake proofer:run` locally
- [ ] I have added or updated documentation in docs/HTML_PROOFER.md if relevant
- [ ] Secrets (GPT5_API_KEY / GPT5_ENDPOINT) handled appropriately
- [ ] This PR is assigned and labeled appropriately

## Testing
Describe how this change was tested locally and/or in CI.

## Merge
Preferred merge method: squash and merge.
